operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add constraint that the returned error profile must be non-increasing (each subsequent value <= previous) to reflect realistic Illumina error behavior.
operator_instances.rationale: In Illumina sequencing, error rates tend to decrease along read positions; adding this constraint ensures the function models realistic biology.

new_checks.description: Verify that the returned list is non-increasing (each element <= previous).

expected_failure_modes: If the function returns a profile that increases at any position (e.g., [0.01, 0.02, ...]), the monotonicity check will fail.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the error profile is non-increasing.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: For all i from 1 to len(profile)-1: profile[i] <= profile[i-1].
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: An implementation that returns any increasing adjacent pair will fail the check.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Replay the main flow and add assertion that profile is non-increasing.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a monotonicity assertion.

checks.description: The returned list must be non-increasing.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add stronger verifier: check that all values are probabilities (0 to 1) and that the output file contains the correct JSON list with monotonicity.
operator_instances.rationale: The current verifier only checks first and last values plus structure. Adding range and monotonicity checks improves robustness.

new_checks.description: The file must contain a JSON list matching the returned profile (exact equality).

expected_failure_modes: Any value outside [0,1] fails range check.
Mismatch between file content and returned list fails file check.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify the profile values are valid probabilities and monotonic.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: All values between 0 and 1, non-increasing, and file output matches.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Hardcoded non-probability values or mismatched file will fail.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Execute main flow and run all new verifier checks.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include range, monotonicity, and file content assertions.

checks.description: error_profile.json must contain the exact same list.
